body_excerpt:
{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45285", "cvss": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Impact

When a user shares a folder or file with a Nextcloud Team that includes an external member (a person added via email address who does not have a Nextcloud account), the system automatically creates a public link for that external member. This public link is not displayed in the share section of the folder, so the folder owner has no knowledge of its existence. It is sent via email to the external member. It grants the same permissions (read, write, delete, reshare, download) as the Team’s access.

An attacker who receives or intercepts this link can access, modify, delete, reshare, and download all data in the shared folder without any further authentication. The folder owner cannot see or revoke the link through the normal sharing interface.

### Patches

<!-- Adjust component name and version. "Nextcloud Enterprise" is only needed for Server and shipped apps -->

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Server is upgraded to 32.0.9, 33.0.3
It is recommended that the Nextcloud Enterprise Server is upgraded to 32.0.9, 33.0.3

### Workarounds

<!-- Remove not applicable sections -->

* No workaround available

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3625932)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/circles/pull/2454)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r3xh-x86g-hw4m", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-r3xh-x86g-hw4m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r3xh-x86g-hw4m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45285"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-12T09:14:43Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Hidden Public Link creation when sharing to a Team External Member", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T09:14:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-r3xh-x86g-hw4m", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "Server"}, "patched_versions": "32.0.9, 33.0.3", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 32.0.0, >= 33.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Hidden Public Link creation when sharing to a Team External Member
